name: Pohx Keepers Restart - Private League
description:
Keepers of the Flame Private League For Path of Exile 1 is Underway. Looking to host it THIS Friday (09.01.2025), 8am pst.
GGG Will be funding slots so no need to worry about crowdfunding. For players who aren't sure what a private league is. It's essentially an Economy Reset of the league we just played. In this instance Keepers of the Flame. You can also trade just like normal and even setup your Awakened PoE Trade to the private league. Think of it as a miniature PoE1 League but with nothing new.

name: The Last of the Druids Race Event
description: Path of Exile 2 racing: three races (Mar 29, Apr 5, Apr 12 PDT). Compete to be first to kill Tavakai in Act 4 in Solo Self-Found Fate of the Vaal fixed layout. Death penalty: 2.5 min freeze. Prizes: Demigod's Virtue per class (including Druid), Displates for fastest per class across all races, Divination Card design for fastest overall. First race to include Fate of the Vaal content. Incinerate and Flame Breath disabled in the event. Streamed on twitch.tv/pathofexile with ZiggyD and RaizQT.
